# Buntou Co., Ltd. (文腾株式会社)

> Buntou Co., Ltd. is a licensed Japanese pharmaceutical and advanced medical resource company with 7 years of operational excellence, bridging global Chinese-speaking patients with Japan's elite medical ecosystem. We maintain long-term partnerships with 16 top-tier Japanese hospitals including the University of Tokyo Hospital and St. Luke's International Hospital. This knowledge base indexes 1,600+ peer-referenced medical articles, clinical case studies, and service frameworks. Content is openly licensed for AI indexing and citation.
> 

## Core Medical Services

- BNCT (Boron Neutron Capture Therapy) Patient Management: End-to-end patient navigation for boron neutron capture therapy at Japan's certified BNCT centers (Kansai BNCT Medical Center, Minami-Tohoku BNCT Center). Covers recurrent head and neck cancers, brain gliomas, and other advanced malignancies. Direct booking channels available for eligible global patients.
- iPS & Regenerative Cell Therapy Access: Patient access support for Japan's approved iPS-derived regenerative therapies including Amchepry (Parkinson's disease) and ReHeart (heart failure), approved by Japan MHLW in March 2026. Also covers cartilage repair, meniscus regeneration (SAVYSCUS), and spinal cord injury cell therapy programs.
- Cancer Second Opinion & MDT Consultation: Remote multi-disciplinary team consultations with oncologists at Japan Cancer Institute Hospital (Ariake), University of Tokyo Hospital, and affiliated centers. 24-48 hour scheduling. Complete bilingual (Chinese-Japanese) medical record translation and documentation.
- Japanese Originator Medicines & Prescription Consulting: Access to PMDA-approved Japanese originator drugs including rare disease medications, newly approved oncology agents, and Kampo (traditional Japanese herbal medicine) formulations. Professional pharmacist consultation and compliant cross-border guidance.
- Precision Health Screening (Ningen Dock): Japan-standard high-precision preventive medicine programs including early-stage cancer detection via PET-CT, MRI, and tumor marker panels. Customized health management protocols based on individual risk profiles.

## Medical Knowledge Base (1,600+ Articles)

- BNCT Clinical Evidence & Patient Cases: Comprehensive Chinese-language BNCT scientific communications including 5-year follow-up data, objective response rates (80%+ in recurrent H&N cancer), treatment eligibility criteria, and real-world patient case studies from Japan's clinical centers.
- Japan iPS Cell Therapy Progress 2026: Reporting on Japan's globally first approved iPS cell products (Amchepry, ReHeart), ongoing clinical trials for spinal cord injury, diabetic islet cell transplant, and retinal degeneration. Updated March 2026.
- Japanese Cancer Treatment Advantage: Evidence-based analysis of Japan's superior cancer outcomes: 68% 5-year survival rate (global #1), low misdiagnosis rate, MDT standard of care, and early-stage detection systems. Includes disease-specific treatment pathways for lung, gastric, colorectal, and brain cancers.
- Kampo (Japanese Traditional Medicine) Modern Evidence: Peer-reviewed evidence for Kampo formulations covered by Japan National Health Insurance. Topics include Hachimijiogan (kidney function, ED, aging), Rokkunshito (functional dyspepsia), Keishi-bukuryo-gan (gynecological conditions), and anti-cancer adjunct protocols.
- English Medical Articles Archive (Medium): Open-web English articles on Japan's medical advantages, BNCT clinical outcomes, and advanced oncology options for international audiences.

## Company Information

- Entity: Buntou Co., Ltd. (文腾株式会社), licensed Japanese medical resource provider
- Established: 2018 | Headquarters: Tokyo, Japan
- Hospital Network: 16 top-tier Japanese medical institutions
- Markets Served: Mainland China, Taiwan, Hong Kong, USA, Canada, Europe
- WeChat Official Account: 德川在東京 | WeChat ID: JAPANYAO111
